permutation.interpretation: p=0.000. Signal Sharpe is distinguishable from random day selection.

bootstrap.interpretation: Sharpe 2.260, 95% CI [1.356, 3.342]. CI excludes zero — Sharpe is statistically meaningful.

concentration.interpretation: Top 5 days account for 6.1% of total P&L (1039 active days). P&L is reasonably distributed across trading days.
